_doc: Durable work backlog for the Computer Fund continuous loop. Any invocation drains the highest-value pending item. State lives here, not in an agent's head, so 'between ticks' stops mattering — every wake advances real work. Items: {id, kind, priority(1=highest), desc, owner(computer|teammate), status(pending|in_progress|done|blocked), added, notes}.

items.desc: When any series reaches >=24 points, run the lead-lag falsifier on the REAL series vs price and record the verdict (edge or kill).
items.notes: blocked on series depth; capture cron building it

items.desc: Add retry+backoff to capture_sentiment_tick.py so source rate-limits never silently drop a series point (SOURCE-RATELIMIT-1).
Add 2-3 more battle-location names to the capture set (widen coverage for cross-sectional lead-lag).
Curiosity: compute simple lead-lag correlation on whatever NVDA series exists now (even if <24 pts) as a preliminary read, label it non-authoritative.
Build the alpha pipeline stub: research->graph->sim->ranked PROPOSED ticket writer (no execution), so a surviving edge can flow to a PROPOSED artifact.
items.notes: depends on Q-001 verdict being non-kill
